subgoal: Tap the email body area (currently showing 'Hi,') to focus the message body for typing
acceptance_criteria: Success means the email message body area is focused for typing: the caret/cursor is placed in the body (near the existing 'Hi,' text) and/or the on-screen keyboard appears, while staying on the compose email form (no navigation away). Recipient autocomplete suggestions, if shown, may collapse as focus moves to the body.

llm_result.reason: The UI remains on the compose email form, but there is no clear indication that the message body gained typing focus (no visible caret/cursor and no on-screen keyboard appearance). The before/after widget structure is essentially unchanged, so focus change to the body is not confirmed.

notable_changes: No meaningful UI change detected; no keyboard/caret evidence of body focus

final.reason: The UI remains on the compose email form, but there is no clear indication that the message body gained typing focus (no visible caret/cursor and no on-screen keyboard appearance). The before/after widget structure is essentially unchanged, so focus change to the body is not confirmed.
